name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top portion of a double boiler, stir together the sugar and cornstarch.
2. Stir in the water.
3. Beat in the egg, lemon juice, and lemon rind.
4. Cook over (not in) boiling water until the mixture thickens.
5. Remove from the heat.
6. Stir in the butter.
7. Cool.
